items.title: Benchmarking a tokenizer
items.scenario: You want to know how long encoding a prompt takes on average.
items.explanation: %timeit encode(prompt) runs it many times and reports a stable average.

items.title: Installing an SDK into the right kernel
items.scenario: import openai fails even though you 'installed' it.
items.explanation: Use %pip install openai so it installs into the kernel's environment, not some other Python.

items.title: Setting an API key for the session
items.scenario: You need OPENAI_API_KEY available to code in this notebook only.
items.explanation: %env OPENAI_API_KEY=... sets it for the kernel session without editing shell config.

items.title: Editing a helper module live
items.scenario: You're refining functions in utils.py while testing them in the notebook.
items.explanation: %load_ext autoreload then %autoreload 2 re-imports the module on every change automatically.
